purpose: Make visual engineering progress apparent per wave and track the path toward 100 plots and graphs.

waves.name: Portal foundation
waves.focus: SSoT, DMAIC, repo split, portal shell

waves.name: Progress dashboard
waves.focus: wave board, proof-gap chart, interface SVG, roadmap visuals

waves.name: Pressure and compressor envelopes
waves.focus: HCC/WCS pressure windows, FSD575 gap, PVPS N+1

waves.name: Monte Carlo and variance
waves.focus: VLP/LP PERT distributions, uncertainty bands, sensitivity

waves.name: Thermodynamics and exergy
waves.focus: JT vs turbine, flash gas, subcooling, exergy, heat leak

waves.name: Control and reliability
waves.focus: LOOP, N+1, buffer ride-through, state machines

waves.name: Release polish
waves.focus: thumbnails, slides, print/PDF, GitHub Pages checks

governance.rule: Generated plots must trace to source/json and source/markdown. The dashboard tracks planned, completed, and proof-blocked plots.
governance.control: Each wave should update this JSON, docs/waves/index.html, and OUTPUT_MANIFEST.json.
